github.title: GitHub access
github.desc: How this server authenticates to GitHub to clone private repos.
github.deviceHint: Open the link and enter this code:
github.patHint: A personal access token stored encrypted for this server.
github.sshAddHint: Add this key to your GitHub account, then deploy:
github.deployKeyHint: Openship registers a read-only deploy key on each repo the first time it deploys there.
github.deployKeyActive: Deploy-key mode active — keys are created on first deploy.

list.title: Servers
list.subtitle: Manage your deployment servers and infrastructure
list.emptyDescription: Connect a server via SSH and Openship will handle the rest - Docker, OpenResty, SSL, and deployments all set up automatically.

comingSoon.clusterBody: Group servers into a cluster and let Openship schedule and balance deployments across them.
comingSoon.networkingBody: Private links, mesh routing, and firewall rules across your servers — managed in one place.

form.sshConnectionDesc: Connect to your server via SSH
form.serverNameHelp: Optional label shown in the server list and header.
form.passwordPlaceholderKeep: Leave blank to keep current password
form.agentInfoBefore: Connects using this machine's SSH agent — like VSCode, no password or key needed. The host running Openship must already have access to this server (a key loaded in its
form.toastPasswordSwitchRequired: Password is required when switching to password auth
form.toastKeyPathSwitchRequired: Key path is required when switching to SSH key auth
form.toastPasswordTestRequired: Password is required to test connection
form.toastKeyPathTestRequired: Key path is required to test connection

detail.serverNotFoundDesc: This server isn't in your workspace, or you don't have access to it. It may have been removed.
detail.removeServerMessage: Are you sure? This will clear all SSH credentials and connection settings.
detail.removeOpenrestyMessage: This removes OpenResty and its managed Lua/config files from the server. Use Reinstall when you only need to refresh analytics scripts or settings.
detail.removeComponentMessage: This removes {label} from the server. This is destructive and may disable related deployment features until you install it again.
detail.removalTakingLonger: Removal is taking longer than expected. Check the server status.
detail.removalTimedOutError: Removal timed out - re-check the server to see the current status.
detail.toastRemovalTimedOut: Removal timed out - re-check server status

banner.unreachableBody: Openship couldn't open an SSH connection to {host}:{port}. Make sure the server is running and that sshd is accepting connections on port {port}. If it's behind a firewall or NAT, confirm the host is reachable from this machine.
banner.authBody: Reached {host}:{port} but the server refused authentication. The key or password stored for this server doesn't match what's authorised in ~/.ssh/authorized_keys on the host.
banner.noServerBody: This server entry is missing SSH settings. Open Edit to set the host, user and credentials, then run a health check.
banner.unknownBody: Openship couldn't talk to this server.
banner.checkPowered: Is the VPS / VM powered on?
banner.pingSuffix: from this machine - does it answer?

ports.title: Port Forwarding
ports.descBefore: Like VS Code: reach a remote server port at
ports.descAfter: on this machine. Bound to loopback only, and active only while forwarded.
ports.toastRemotePortRange: Remote port must be between 1 and 65535

security.title: Rate Limiting
security.subtitle: OpenResty request rate limiting for this server
security.couldntRead: Couldn't read OpenResty rate limit config
security.retryHint: Retry after confirming OpenResty is installed and reachable on this server.
security.loadedFromLive: Loaded from the live OpenResty config. Press edit to change it.
security.editLiveHint: Edit the live OpenResty rate limit for this server.
security.noLimitHint: No rate limit is active yet. Set requests per second to create one.
security.advancedHint: Override the automatic burst calculation when you need finer control.
security.burstModeHint: Auto keeps burst in sync with requests per second. Manual lets you override it.
security.whitelistHint: These IPs bypass rate limiting. Loopback (127.0.0.1, ::1) is always whitelisted.
security.toastFailedSave: Failed to save rate limit settings

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.description: Live SSH shells over WebSocket. Up to 3 concurrent — copy on select.

setup.enterDetails: Enter your server details and choose an auth method
setup.needServer: A server with SSH access (Ubuntu, Debian, or similar)
setup.needAuth: SSH key or password for authentication
setup.needChecks: After saving, Openship will run checks and install the missing backend-defined prerequisites for you.
setup.subChoose: Choose how you'd like to set up your server
setup.autoDesc: Check requirements and install everything automatically. One click - Openship handles Docker, OpenResty, and Git.
setup.stepDesc: Review each component and choose what to install. See detailed status before proceeding.
setup.skipDesc: Add the server without installing anything — just monitor its health. You can run setup later from the server's page.
setup.runningChecks: Running system health checks via SSH
setup.toastSaveBeforeSetup: Save the server before running setup
setup.toastSaveBeforeInstall: Save the server before installing components
